title: rhodax distachyos subsp. rubellus
intro: Rhodax distachyos subsp. rubellus, also known as red orach, is a plant species belonging to the Amaranthaceae family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues such as skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of red orach include its ability to improve skin conditions, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Red orach can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or salves, and is often used in folk medicine and herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
